_doc: Embedded tactical visuals for 12 Lead Magnet Ideas for Home Service. {palette} resolves at runtime.

embedded-1.notes: Part 2 lead visual. The 12 Lead Magnet Ideas matrix. 4x3 grid with name + best-vertical labels per cell.
embedded-1.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference matrix showing the 12 Lead Magnet Ideas for Home Service. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. No font names, no typography labels, no instructions inside the image.
3. Spell every word and number exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "The 12 Lead Magnet Ideas"
SUBTITLE: "Format. Best vertical fit. Conversion benchmark."

COMPOSITION: a 4-column by 3-row matrix of 12 medium-sized rounded-rectangle cards, evenly spaced with comfortable gutters. Each card contains 3 stacked text elements: an idea NUMBER pill at the top-left, the IDEA NAME as the main label centered, the BEST-VERTICAL example as a smaller sub-label, and the CONVERSION BENCHMARK as a small condensed mono pill at the bottom-right.

CELL 1 (row 1, column 1):
Number pill: "01"
Idea name: "Cost Calculator"
Best-vertical: "HVAC / Roofing / Kitchen"
Conversion pill: "30-40%"

CELL 2 (row 1, column 2):
Number pill: "02"
Idea name: "Repair-vs-Replace Quiz"
Best-vertical: "HVAC / Roofing / Windows"
Conversion pill: "35-45%"

CELL 3 (row 1, column 3):
Number pill: "03"
Idea name: "Project Timeline Estimator"
Best-vertical: "Pool / Deck / Garage"
Conversion pill: "25-35%"

CELL 4 (row 1, column 4):
Number pill: "04"
Idea name: "Materials Comparison Guide"
Best-vertical: "Deck / Roof / Window"
Conversion pill: "18-28%"

CELL 5 (row 2, column 1):
Number pill: "05"
Idea name: "Permit Cheat Sheet by Zip"
Best-vertical: "Solar / Addition / Fence"
Conversion pill: "22-32%"

CELL 6 (row 2, column 2):
Number pill: "06"
Idea name: "Pre-Project Checklist"
Best-vertical: "Bathroom / Panel / Driveway"
Conversion pill: "18-26%"

CELL 7 (row 2, column 3):
Number pill: "07"
Idea name: "Vendor Vetting Worksheet"
Best-vertical: "Any Trade Contractor"
Conversion pill: "20-30%"

CELL 8 (row 2, column 4):
Number pill: "08"
Idea name: "Maintenance Calendar"
Best-vertical: "HVAC / Lawn / Pool / Pest"
Conversion pill: "15-22%"

CELL 9 (row 3, column 1):
Number pill: "09"
Idea name: "Trouble-Shooting Diagnostic"
Best-vertical: "HVAC / Plumbing / Electrical"
Conversion pill: "25-35%"

CELL 10 (row 3, column 2):
Number pill: "10"
Idea name: "Local Rebate Finder"
Best-vertical: "Solar / Heat Pump / HVAC"
Conversion pill: "35-45%"

CELL 11 (row 3, column 3):
Number pill: "11"
Idea name: "Hidden Cost Reveal Guide"
Best-vertical: "Kitchen / Pool / Deck"
Conversion pill: "20-30%"

CELL 12 (row 3, column 4):
Number pill: "12"
Idea name: "Seasonal Tip Pack"
Best-vertical: "HVAC / Roof / Lawn"
Conversion pill: "18-25%"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Number pill (top-left of each card): condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase, on a small dark indigo pill background
- Idea name (centered, main label): bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Best-vertical sub-label: medium sans-serif, off-white at 75% opacity, smaller size
- Conversion pill (bottom-right of each card): condensed mono-spaced, electric purple #7C3AED on off-white pill background, smaller size

CARD STYLING:
- Each card is a rounded rectangle with thin bright cyan #06B6D4 outline at low opacity.
- Card backgrounds: dark indigo with subtle inner gradient.
- Cards 1, 9, and 10 (the three highest-converting ideas: Calculator, Diagnostic, Rebate Finder) have a slightly brighter cyan glow ring around the card outline, telegraphing them as the priority picks.
- Even spacing with comfortable gutters between cards.

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces.
- No realistic photographic-style icons inside the cards (no HVAC units, roofs, hammers, wrenches).
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No real home service brand names.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference matrix.

embedded-2.notes: Part 3 visual. The Ideation Template 5-Step Flow.
embedded-2.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference flow showing the 5-Step Ideation Template for spawning lead magnet ideas in any home service vertical. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.
3. No font names or typography labels inside the image.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "The Ideation Template"
SUBTITLE: "5 steps from blank page to your top 3 lead magnet ideas for any home service vertical."

COMPOSITION: 5 horizontally-arranged step boxes connected left-to-right by thin bright cyan #06B6D4 arrows. Each step box is a rounded rectangle with a numbered step pill at the top, the step name as the main label, and a one-line description beneath. Below each step box, a small example output card showing what that step produces for a sample vertical (garage door installer).

STEP BOX 1 (far left):
Step pill at top: "STEP 1"
Main label: "List the 5 Biggest Decisions"
Sub-text: "Write the 5 highest-stakes decisions a buyer makes during the project."
Example card beneath: "Repair vs replace · Standard vs insulated · Material · Smart vs manual · DIY vs pro"

STEP BOX 2 (left of center):
Step pill at top: "STEP 2"
Main label: "Map the Data Each Decision Needs"
Sub-text: "For each decision, what calculation or comparison would make it easier?"
Example card beneath: "Door age · Climate zone · Cost per door · Smart features · Install time"

STEP BOX 3 (center):
Step pill at top: "STEP 3"
Main label: "Match Each to a Format"
Sub-text: "Use the lookup: numerical = calculator, either-or = quiz, multi-option = guide."
Example card beneath: "Quiz · Calculator · Guide · Guide · Diagnostic"

STEP BOX 4 (right of center):
Step pill at top: "STEP 4"
Main label: "Score Conversion x Build"
Sub-text: "Score 1 to 10 on conversion potential and build difficulty. Multiply for priority."
Example card beneath: "Quiz: 64 · Diagnostic: 56 · Material guide: 45 · Smart guide: 36 · Calc: 35"

STEP BOX 5 (far right):
Step pill at top: "STEP 5"
Main label: "Ship the Top 3 in Order"
Sub-text: "Build the highest-priority idea this month, then the second, then the third."
Example card beneath: "Month 1: Repair-vs-replace quiz · Month 2: DIY diagnostic · Month 3: Material guide"

ARROWS:
- Between each step box, a thin bright cyan #06B6D4 arrow line with a soft glow at the arrowhead.
- The flow reads strictly left to right.

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Step pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4 on dark indigo pill background, uppercase
- Step main labels: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Step sub-text: italic medium sans-serif, off-white at 75% opacity
- Example cards: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white rounded card, smaller size

BOX STYLING:
- Each step box is a rounded rectangle with thin bright cyan outline.
- Step box backgrounds: dark indigo with subtle inner gradient.
- Example cards beneath each step box are off-white rounded cards with light shadow.
- The final step box (Step 5, the output) has a brighter cyan glow ring around its outline as the visual destination.

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient. Subtle paper grain.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces.
- No realistic icons (no lightbulbs, no gears, no checkmarks-as-icons, no clipboards).
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No real home service brand names. No real garage door brand names.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference flow.

embedded-3.notes: Part 4 visual. Format Specs Cheat Sheet table. 5 rows (Calculator/Quiz/Guide/Checklist/Diagnostic) x 5 columns.
embedded-3.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference table showing the Format Specs Cheat Sheet for the 5 main lead magnet formats. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.
3. No font names or typography labels inside the image.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "Format Specs Cheat Sheet"
SUBTITLE: "Page count. Conversion benchmark. Build time. Software. Best for."

COMPOSITION: a 5-column table with 5 data rows plus a header row. Total 6 rows.

HEADER ROW (cyan pills, uppercase): "FORMAT", "PAGE COUNT", "CONVERSION", "BUILD TIME", "SOFTWARE"

ROW 1:
Format: "Calculator"
Page Count: "1 web tool + 2-4 page PDF"
Conversion: "30-40%"
Build Time: "8-24 hrs"
Software: "Outgrow / Typeform / custom JS"

ROW 2:
Format: "Quiz"
Page Count: "1 web tool with branching"
Conversion: "35-45%"
Build Time: "4-12 hrs"
Software: "Typeform / Tally / Interact"

ROW 3:
Format: "Guide (PDF)"
Page Count: "8-16 pages"
Conversion: "18-28%"
Build Time: "12-30 hrs"
Software: "Canva / Figma / Notion"

ROW 4:
Format: "Checklist"
Page Count: "1-2 pages, printable"
Conversion: "18-30%"
Build Time: "3-8 hrs"
Software: "Canva / Notion"

ROW 5:
Format: "Diagnostic"
Page Count: "1 page or interactive"
Conversion: "25-35%"
Build Time: "6-16 hrs"
Software: "Whimsical / Tally / Canva"

BELOW THE TABLE, A SMALL FOOTNOTE STRIP:
"Best for:  Calculator = numerical answers   ·   Quiz = either-or decisions   ·   Guide = multi-option comparisons   ·   Checklist = process or sequence   ·   Diagnostic = symptom triage"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Header row pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase
- Format column (column 1): bold sans-serif, off-white
- Page Count column (column 2): medium sans-serif, off-white at 90%, smaller
- Conversion column (column 3): bold condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, larger size, centered
- Build Time column (column 4): condensed mono-spaced, off-white at 90%, centered
- Software column (column 5): medium sans-serif, off-white at 85%, smaller
- Footnote strip: italic medium sans-serif, off-white at 70%, with bright cyan middle-dot separators

ROW STYLING:
- Row 1 (Calculator, the highest-converting format) has a subtle bright cyan glow around its row outline, telegraphing the priority winner.
- Alternating row backgrounds: rounded rectangles with thin bright cyan outlines, alternating subtle indigo intensity.

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces.
- No realistic icons (no calculators, magnifying glasses, clipboards, lightbulbs as decorative icons inside cells).
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No real software brand logos (just the names as text).
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference table.

embedded-4.notes: Part 7 visual. The 6-Week Launch Plan timeline.
embedded-4.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference timeline showing the 6-Week Launch Plan for a home service lead magnet. Aspect 5:4.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.
3. No font names or typography labels inside the image.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "The 6-Week Launch Plan"
SUBTITLE: "From 'I should do lead magnets' to 100 captures per month."

COMPOSITION: a vertical timeline with 6 week-blocks stacked top to bottom. Each block contains a week-number pill on the left, the week's name as the main label, a sub-text describing the deliverable, and a small milestone marker on the right showing the week's KPI target.

DOWN THE LEFT EDGE: a thin vertical bright cyan #06B6D4 timeline rail with small circular markers at each week node.

WEEK 1 BLOCK (top):
Week pill: "WEEK 1"
Main label: "Ideation"
Sub-text: "List the 5 buyer decisions. Score each idea. Pick your top 3."
Milestone marker (right side): "3 prioritized ideas"

WEEK 2 BLOCK:
Week pill: "WEEK 2"
Main label: "Build the Top Idea"
Sub-text: "3 days design. 1 day email gate. 1 day landing page. Ship V1."
Milestone marker (right side): "Magnet live"

WEEK 3 BLOCK:
Week pill: "WEEK 3"
Main label: "Ship and Chase 100 Leads"
Sub-text: "Homepage hero + exit-intent + $300-600 Facebook ad test."
Milestone marker (right side): "100 captures"

WEEK 4 BLOCK:
Week pill: "WEEK 4"
Main label: "Measure and Iterate"
Sub-text: "Pull conversion numbers. One specific fix this week, not five."
Milestone marker (right side): "Conversion baseline"

WEEK 5 BLOCK:
Week pill: "WEEK 5"
Main label: "Build Idea #2"
Sub-text: "Ship the second magnet from your priority list."
Milestone marker (right side): "2 magnets live"

WEEK 6 BLOCK (bottom):
Week pill: "WEEK 6"
Main label: "Multiply Across Cities"
Sub-text: "Spin idea #1 across 5-10 service-area landing pages."
Milestone marker (right side): "Multi-city pipeline"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Week pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4 on dark indigo pill background, uppercase
- Main labels: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Sub-text: italic medium sans-serif, off-white at 75% opacity
- Milestone markers: condensed mono-spaced, electric purple #7C3AED on off-white pill background, smaller size

BLOCK STYLING:
- Each week block is a rounded rectangle with thin bright cyan outline at low opacity.
- Block backgrounds: dark indigo with subtle inner gradient.
- The Week 6 block (the destination) has a brighter cyan glow ring around its outline.
- Even vertical spacing between blocks.

TIMELINE RAIL:
- Thin vertical bright cyan #06B6D4 line on the far-left edge of the composition.
- Small circular bright cyan node markers at each week's vertical position, connecting the rail to each week block.
- The line ends with a slightly larger glowing node at Week 6.

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces.
- No realistic icons (no calendar pages, no rockets, no checkmarks-as-icons, no progress bars).
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No real software brand logos.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference timeline.
